name: AI-Powered API Data Fetcher and Analyzer
description: Takes a natural language query, uses Claude AI to determine what data to fetch, researches relevant APIs via Exa, scrapes the best data source with Firecrawl, analyzes the results with AI, and posts a structured summary to Slack.

source.originalName: Allow your AI to call an API to fetch data

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for API discovery

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for data scraping

query.description: Natural language query describing what data to fetch (e.g. 'Get the latest Bitcoin price and 24h change')

steps.name: Build Exa query to find relevant data sources
Search for relevant data sources via Exa
Select the best data source URL to scrape
Scrape the best data source with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for data analysis
Parse Claude output and strip fences
Build Slack message with extracted data
